title: Immersive Interfaces
description: Shrimp's Immersive Interfaces is a complete graphical revamp of Minecraft's GUI,  brings variety and charm to the previously grey boxes.
body:
![Main cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abed9b1f336d06deb0b05235c25e26230855ba29.png) ![Immersive Interfaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d9d5b2f8fd4dc2c492d80e41b56ca62698a333.png) [](https://ko-fi.com/shrimpsnail) [](https://discord.gg/cXqaqWP9pk) [](https://github.com/Shrimpsnail/Immersive-Interfaces) #### This resource pack revamps the grey boxes you're always looking at into something with a bit more personality, with small pixel art scenes of what you're looking at. All features of this resource pack are **completely vanilla** unless advertised as such ## Prefer seeing slots? (Sorry this is being reworked!) If you've seen slots previously and are interested, they are currently being reworked to the new system, they are not currently available.
> ### Current Progress > >![Roadmap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/272a91987f8f86fbda5818404804f34ee17b74aa.png)
